# SR Ventures — Builders & Interiors

> SR Ventures is a turnkey home builder and interior design company in Kerala, India. It handles the entire chain of building a home — architecture and interior design, construction, and land legal work plus statutory building approvals — in-house, under one contract ("one roof, no middlemen").

## What they do
- Turnkey home construction (design + build under one contract)
- Interior design and execution
- Renovation and remodelling
- Land legal documentation and building approvals (handled in-house)

## Key facts
- Location / service area: Kochi, Ernakulam, Thrissur and surrounding districts, Kerala, India
- Homes delivered: 120+
- Years operating: 14
- On-time handover rate: 98%
- Average client rating: 4.9 / 5
- Typical villa build time: 8–11 months for a 2,000–2,500 sq ft home, from approved drawings to handover
- Pricing model: transparent fixed-cost estimate agreed before work begins

## Differentiator
Unlike a builder who hands off to a separate interior firm, SR Ventures keeps design, construction and legal under one accountable team — so there are no coordination gaps between the drawing and the doorway.

## Pages
- Home: https://srventures.example/
- Portfolio (exteriors, interiors, kitchens, bedrooms, living rooms, dining rooms, wardrobes): https://srventures.example/portfolio.html
